questions.question: Which restaurants in Denver Co are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Denver Co with weekend hours include: Chick-fil-A (Sat: 06:00-22:00), Vellichor Coffee Roasters (Sat: 06:30-15:00), DQ Grill & Chill (Sat: 10:30-22:00), McDonald's (Sat: 05:00-24:00), Hunan Dynasty (Sat: 11:00-22:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Virgilio's Pizzeria & Wine Bar (Sat: 11:00-20:25), The Cow Eatery (Sat: 07:00-20:00) and 1077 more. 1085 total with weekend availability.
